Metadata.description: GloRe is an open network that aims to enlarge its audience both of volunteers and NGOs all over the world to make certificates available to everybody.
Metadata.keywords: glore, volunteering, global network, NGO, certificate, soft skills, courses, learning, community
Metadata.pwaDescription: Install GloRe on your device to access courses, receive notifications, and manage your certificates offline.
Metadata.title: GloRe - Global Volunteering Network

Auth.signupDialogMessage:
Individual users can sign up to GloRe only with an invitation from their organization.

If your organization is part of the GloRe network and you want to get access as a volunteer, tutor or coordinator, ask a representative to send you an invitation.

If your organization is not yet registered on GloRe, you can submit a registration request below.

For more information, please visit our website.

Courses.description: GloRe offers a wide range of learning courses to help you develop your soft skills and knowledge. Each course is designed to be interactive and engaging, providing you with the tools you need to succeed in your personal and professional life. After completing at least 3 courses, you will be able to request a certificate of completion.
Courses.descriptionAdmin: As an admin, you can manage the courses available on the platform. You can create and publish new courses, edit existing ones, and archive courses that are no longer relevant.
Courses.descriptionEditor: As an editor, you can create, edit and translate courses across the platform.

categories.name: Name

About.title: About GloRe
About.description: The Global Recognition Certificate for volunteering and non-formal learning.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide global recognition for skills and competences gained through volunteering and non-formal learning experiences. GloRe bridges the gap between informal education and professional development.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where every learning experience is valued and recognized, regardless of where or how it was acquired. We believe in the transformative power of volunteering.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Inclusivity, transparency, and empowerment through recognition of diverse learning paths. We are committed to making certification accessible to everyone.

network.title: Our Network
network.description: A growing network of organizations across Europe committed to recognizing non-formal learning. Partner organizations collaborate to ensure consistent quality and standards.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: The GloRe Certificate process is simple and transparent. Follow these steps to get your certificate.

step1.title: Complete activities
step1.description: Participate in volunteering or non-formal learning activities with a GloRe partner organization.

step2.title: Document learning
step2.description: Record your competences and skills gained through the experience using the GloRe platform.

step3.title: Get certified
step3.description: Receive your GloRe Certificate, recognized across the European network of partner organizations.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Interested in joining the GloRe network or learning more? Reach out to us through your local partner organization.

Help.title: Help & Support
Help.description: Everything you need to get the most out of GloRe Certificate.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.description: Follow these steps to start your GloRe journey.

step1.title: Join an organization
step1.description: Register and request to join a GloRe partner organization. An admin will approve your membership and assign you a role.

step2.title: Complete courses
step2.description: Enroll in skill courses, complete lessons, and submit your self-evaluations to build your competence profile.

step3.title: Request your certificate
step3.description: Once you have completed at least 3 courses with a rating of 3 or above, you can request your GloRe Certificate.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Browse the documentation to learn more about the platform.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: Learn the basics of GloRe Certificate, roles, and the certification process.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about courses, certificates, and organizations.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.description: Step-by-step guides to help you navigate the platform and complete key tasks.

contact.title: Need more help?
contact.description: Contact us at {email} or visit our website at {website} for additional support.

Certificates.alreadyHave: You already have a certificate with this organization
Certificates.cantRequest: You can't request a certificate yet
Certificates.certificateMessagePost: carried out a volunteer activity at {org}, during which they demonstrated commitment, team spirit, and interpersonal skills, acquiring valuable soft skills.
Certificates.description: GloRe certificates are an official recognition of your volunteering experience and acquired soft skills. They are issued by GloRe and can be shared on your social media profiles or added to your CV. You can request your certificate after completing at least 3 courses with a final evaluation of at least 3 out of 5.
Certificates.approvedBanner: Your certificate has been approved! Download it or share it with the world.
Certificates.invalidCoursesMessage: You've rated some of your skills less than {rating} starts. You need a higher grade to request a certificate. Go back to the courses section to complete new courses and get higher ratings.

auth/invite.buttonInstruction: Click the button below to accept and set up your account:
